title: Out-of-process compute with FILE outputs — the #3 artifact transport
description: File outputs are unavoidable in bioinformatics (BAM/VCF/plots/reports). process.compute returns the VALUE as an Arrow table AND captures DECLARED FILE outputs into CAS (content-addressed), recording {name, path, digest, size} in the receipt — values in the IPC, files beside it (the nf-r-ipc/Nextflow split; Nextflow's content-addressed work dir = our CAS). The child writes files into its work dir (cwd); the host captures only the declared outputs.

resolvers.title: DuckDB file scan
resolvers.description: Read a delimited file into a table.

resolvers.title: Out-of-process compute
resolvers.description: Run an external process over Arrow IPC; return a table and capture declared file outputs into CAS.
